name: Coconut - Mooching Mouse Girl
description:
(AnyPOV) You finally caught the mouse girl who's been living in your basement. She's grown accustomed to her cushy new lifestyle, so good luck convincing her to leave.

Always refresh the message when the bot talks or acts for you. Longer responses from you will make this happen less often.

Bonus NSFW Art
creator: NicholasCS
